case_title: KAZIMIERZ BALAJ RESPONDENT VS. ALICIA LOPATA APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LOPATA, ALICIA OWNER OF NEW IMAGE SALON AS TO RESPONDENT BALAJ, KAZIMIERZ HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 809340
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

TRIAL DE NOVO HELD. MATTER SUBMITTED TO THE COURT. THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR PLTF KAZIMIERZ BALAJ AND AGAINST DEFT ALICIA LOPATA IN THE SUM OF $3,000 PLUS $97, COSTS. EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (505)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALAJ, KAZIMIERZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPATA, ALICIA OWNER OF NEW IMAGE SALON $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,097.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. EXHIBITS ORDERED RETURNED.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2005 - CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 505 PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
MINUTES FOR JAN-06-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
